what: 2. Differentially private scree and PVE plots
title: dppca
text: dp_scree() computes private scree values proportions variance explained using one several private estimators. Available methods : "clipped": clipped mean based estimator "pmwm": private modified winsorized mean based estimator "huber": Huber-type robust estimator Method-specific tuning parameters supplied control helper functions: draw private scree/PVE plot, use dp_scree_plot(): Use type = "pve" plot proportions variance explained, type = "scree" plot raw scree values. Plot styling handled internally user-facing interface stays simple.
code: res <- dp_scree(   X,   k = 5,   method = "pmwm",   eps_total = 1,   delta_total = 1e-6,   center = TRUE,   standardize = FALSE,   control = pmwm_control(a = 0, b = 10) ) clipped_control(C_clip = 3)  pmwm_control(   beta = 1.01,   a = 0,   b = 10,   trim_const = 10,   eta = 0.01,   split_mode = TRUE )  huber_control(   mu0 = 0,   eta0 = 1,   T = 50,   M = 20,   k_min_m2 = -40,   k_max_m2 = 40,   m2_frac = 1 / 4 ) dp_scree_plot(   X,   k = 5,   dp_scree_method = "all",   eps_total = 1,   delta_total = 1e-6,   center = TRUE,   standardize = FALSE,   type = "pve",   control = list(     clipped = clipped_control(C_clip = 3),     pmwm = pmwm_control(a = 0, b = 10),     huber = huber_control(T = 50, M = 20)   ) )

what: Differentially private scree estimation via Huber-type robust mean — dp_scree_huber
title: Differentially private scree estimation via Huber-type robust mean — dp_scree_huber
text: Internal helper estimates leading scree values using Huber-type differentially private mean estimator applied centered squared scores principal component. procedure follows: preprocess data matrix PCA, compute non-private private direction matrix, form projected score matrix, component \(\ell\), compute centered squared scores \(w_{\ell} = (y_{\ell} - \bar y_\ell)^2\), privately estimate scale proxy \(w_{1\ell}, \dots, w_{n\ell}\) using dp_m2(), convert scale proxy Huber threshold using tau_from_m2(), run noisy gradient descent via dp_huber_noisy_gd() obtain private mean estimate \(w_{\ell}\), apply \(n/(n-1)\) correction obtain final scree estimate. mono = TRUE, final scree vector post-processed nonnegative nonincreasing.
